modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with Microsoft Office activation and functionality on multiple systems.

full_description_text:  
Microsoft Office is not functioning properly on two computers. There are activation issues with Office 2013, and Outlook has stopped working after the DUO rollout. Additionally, documents appear incorrect when opened, and there are errors saving to SharePoint.
short_description: Issues with Microsoft Office activation and functionality on multiple systems.
description: Microsoft Office is not functioning properly on two computers. There are activation issues with Office 2013, and Outlook has stopped working after the DUO rollout. Additionally, documents appear incorrect when opened, and there are errors saving to SharePoint.
